# agentmail4k

> Idiomatic Kotlin DSL for the AgentMail API, built on Ktor and kotlinx.serialization.

A DSL-driven Kotlin client for the AgentMail email API. All API calls are coroutine-native suspend functions. Provides fluent builders for every operation, scoped access to inbox and pod resources, and built-in workflows for polling, auto-reply, bulk sends, and webhook handling.

## Docs

- [Getting Started](website/agentmail/docs/getting-started.md): Set up your API key and send your first message
- [Configuration](website/agentmail/docs/configuration.md): Customize timeouts, retries, and base URL
- [Inboxes](website/agentmail/docs/inboxes.md): Create, list, update, and delete inboxes
- [Messages](website/agentmail/docs/messages.md): Send, reply, forward, list, and manage email messages
- [Threads](website/agentmail/docs/threads.md): List, retrieve, and delete email threads
- [Drafts](website/agentmail/docs/drafts.md): Compose, update, send, and manage email drafts
- [Domains](website/agentmail/docs/domains.md): Custom domain creation, verification, and DNS management
- [Pods](website/agentmail/docs/pods.md): Isolated workspace management and scoped access
- [Webhooks](website/agentmail/docs/webhooks.md): Webhook creation, event handling, and signature verification
- [Lists](website/agentmail/docs/lists.md): Allow/block lists for senders, recipients, domains, and subjects
- [Metrics](website/agentmail/docs/metrics.md): Email event metrics and organization information
- [Scoped Access](website/agentmail/docs/scoped-access.md): Inbox and pod scoped access patterns
- [Workflows](website/agentmail/docs/workflows.md): Polling, auto-reply, bulk operations, and webhook handling

## API

- [AgentMailClient](src/main/kotlin/com/agentmail4k/sdk/AgentMailClient.kt): Main entry point; holds all API resources and provides scoped access via `inboxes()` and `pods()`
- [AgentMailConfig](src/main/kotlin/com/agentmail4k/sdk/AgentMailConfig.kt): DSL builders for client configuration (API key, base URL, timeouts, retries)
- [InboxResource](src/main/kotlin/com/agentmail4k/sdk/resource/InboxResource.kt): CRUD operations for inboxes
- [MessageResource](src/main/kotlin/com/agentmail4k/sdk/resource/MessageResource.kt): Send, reply, reply-all, forward, and manage messages
- [ThreadResource](src/main/kotlin/com/agentmail4k/sdk/resource/ThreadResource.kt): List, get, and delete email threads
- [DraftResource](src/main/kotlin/com/agentmail4k/sdk/resource/DraftResource.kt): Compose, update, send, and manage drafts
- [DomainResource](src/main/kotlin/com/agentmail4k/sdk/resource/DomainResource.kt): Custom domain management and DNS verification
- [PodResource](src/main/kotlin/com/agentmail4k/sdk/resource/PodResource.kt): Pod (workspace) management
- [WebhookResource](src/main/kotlin/com/agentmail4k/sdk/resource/WebhookResource.kt): Webhook subscription management
- [ListResource](src/main/kotlin/com/agentmail4k/sdk/resource/ListResource.kt): Allow/block list entry management
- [MetricsResource](src/main/kotlin/com/agentmail4k/sdk/resource/MetricsResource.kt): Email event metrics queries
- [InboxScope](src/main/kotlin/com/agentmail4k/sdk/resource/InboxScope.kt): Scoped access to resources nested under an inbox
- [PodScope](src/main/kotlin/com/agentmail4k/sdk/resource/PodScope.kt): Scoped access to resources nested under a pod
- [WebhookHandler](src/main/kotlin/com/agentmail4k/dsl/WebhookHandler.kt): Webhook payload verification and event dispatch
- [Monitor](src/main/kotlin/com/agentmail4k/dsl/Monitor.kt): Inbox polling with message handlers
- [AutoReply](src/main/kotlin/com/agentmail4k/dsl/AutoReply.kt): Rule-based automatic reply system
- [Bulk](src/main/kotlin/com/agentmail4k/dsl/Bulk.kt): Batch send and thread iteration operations
